response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference lyrics. The lyrics are sung twice in this 5-minute promotional slideshow video (at 02:12 and 04:31). I have included both instances with precise timestamps. I also transcribed major full-screen title cards ('Attention', 'Penlight Colors', and 'Pre-registration') as they represent significant semantic transitions in the visual content. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal onset and the visual appearance of text cards.
